ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-27-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUL-11-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUILAIPP, OSCAR $5,120.30 PRINCIPAL, $173.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,293.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
